pinpoint.campaign.campaigneventfilter.Cf: Specifies the settings for events that cause a campaign to be sent.

pinpoint.campaign.campaigneventfilter.Di.Description: The dimension settings of the event filter for the campaign.

pinpoint.campaign.campaigneventfilter.Fi.Description: The type of event that causes the campaign to be sent. Valid values are: `SYSTEM`, sends the campaign when a system event occurs; and, `ENDPOINT`, sends the campaign when an endpoint event (Events resource) occurs.
